arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher names best stadium in world football and Anfield doesn't come close
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher played at some of the world's most famous stadiums during his long career at Liverpool and the former England international has a clear number one

arts.ttl: Man City Player Refused to Clap Liverpool During Guard of Honour in 2020
arts.sum: Manchester City star Bernardo Silva refused to clap during a guard of honour for Liverpool after the Reds won the Premier League in 2020.

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool target ‘intelligent’ forward with 19 G/A as Darwin Nunez replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly setting their sights on bolstering their attacking options this summer, with Inter Milan’s Marcus Thuram emerging as a prime target. The French forward has been turning heads with his performances in Serie A following his free transfer to the San Siro – and it’s been reported via TBRFootball that Liverpool scouts were […] The post Report: Liverpool target ‘intelligent’ forward with 19 G/A as Darwin Nunez replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool to see '£33.5m offer go in' for 'brilliant' Mo Salah replacement suggestion
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly weighing up a summer move for Bournemouth star Antoine Semenyo, who has also been linked with a switch to Liverpool in recent months

arts.ttl: Liverpool's No. 1 conundrum: Alisson or Kelleher to make way for Mamardashvili?
arts.sum: It's a good problem to have, but in Alisson Becker, Caoimhín Kelleher and Giorgi Mamardashvili, Arne Slot must decide which keeper will be Liverpool No. 1 next season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2025-26 adidas kits leaked as Reds announce £60m+ a year switch from Nike
arts.sum: Liverpool have announced a blockbuster new kit deal that will see their shirts and training wear manufactured by adidas after leaving Nike and fans have already had a sneak peak of their new gear

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Real Madrid one of three clubs 'ready to offer contract' to Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Real Madrid are allegedly one of three European clubs who are preparing to offer a contract to Liverpool defender Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney says Arsenal and Man Utd have same problem that Liverpool are 'exception' to
arts.sum: Manchester United's all-time leading goalscorer Wayne Rooney says his old club and Arsenal have the same problem after watching them play out a 1-1 draw at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Liverpool confirm new £300m kit deal after parting ways with Nike
arts.sum: Liverpool have been with American sportswear giants Nike since 2020 but the Reds have confirmed a lucrative new deal ahead of next season with the Reds set to be defending champions

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool identify affordable Alexander Isak alternative to bolster attack
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to make signing a new striker in the summer their priority. While they have faced no issues in scoring goals this season, it is largely down to the brilliant form of Mohamed Salah.
